_meta.name: Host-side R2 sync watchers
_meta.purpose: Periodic rclone copy of ckpt dirs from RunPod pods to R2. Immune to RUNPOD_VOLUMELESS_EPHEMERAL_WIPE — installed on the Mac/Linux host, NOT on the pod.
_meta.schedule: Invoked every 2h by shared/launchd/com.anima.r2-sync-watcher.plist (StartInterval=7200) OR manually: hexa scripts/r2_sync_watcher.hexa
_meta.secrets: ~/.config/rclone/rclone.conf (r2 remote) + default ssh-agent key — never written to this file

watchers.// NOTE: Pod abx2uqoa7qbbh8 terminated 2026-04-17 (sshd dead, GPU 0% for 2.5h). Re-enable with new pod_id/host/port when CLM r4 training resumes from R2 step_5000 ckpt.
watchers.note: CLM 1B r4 training on volumeInGb=0 pod. Pod ID drifts on restart; update host+port after each runpodctl start.
